content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.3.9 — Incentivized review WARN — paywall offers Premium in exchange for a 5-star review (App/PaywallView.swift:12)
Pierre: Apple prohibits incentivizing reviews or manipulating star ratings, as it distorts App Store trust signals. The paywall copy "Leave a 5-star review and get 1 week of Premium free!" is a clear quid-pro-quo reward tied to a specific rating, which will likely trigger a 2.3.9 rejection. Remove the reward-for-review offer entirely, or use Apple's `SKStoreReviewController` without any incentive or star-count requirement.
